rulings.Case Title: GUM D. KOO ET AL VS. KEVIN W. CHENG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel As To Defendant Kevin Cheng
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 23, 2023 line 1. DEFENDANT KEVIN CHENG Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel As To Defendant Kevin Cheng is OFF CALENDAR. Substitution of attorney on file. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: JOHN SAMUELS VS. 18 LANSING STREET OWNERS' ASSOCIATION, A ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 23, 2023 line 2. PLAINTIFF JOHN SAMUELS, JOHN SAMUELS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Defendant failed to show prejudice. Defendant's arguments to the merits of the allegations in the SAC are not before the Court at this time. Plaintiff to file their Second Amended Complaint forthwith. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: NAIFEH AZAR VS. MARIYA LYUBLINA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Special Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 23, 2023 line 3. DEFENDANT CLAUDIO A. BLUER Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Special Motion To Strike is GRANTED. Pursuant to CCP section 425.16(f), the Court has discretion to allow the late-filing of a special motion to strike. The filing advances the statute's purpose; Plaintiff did not show any undue prejudice; the length of delay is short; and the reason for delay is not unreasonable. (San Diegans for Open Government v. Har Construction, Inc. (2015) 240 Cal.App.4th 611, 624.) =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: VELMA D. MAR VS. CINFONIE CHU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 23, 2023 line 9. DEFENDANT CINFONIE CHIU DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED.
